name: web-dev-mcp
description: Monorepo for web development MCP tools

scripts.build: npm run build -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-gateway && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-vite && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-astro && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-nextjs
scripts.prepublish:check: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-gateway && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-vite && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-astro && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-nextjs
scripts.publish:all: npm publish -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-gateway && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-vite && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-astro && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/web-dev-mcp-nextjs
